CAT05-043.headline: Workplace Bullying
CAT05-043.subtitle: Recognizing patterns and taking action
CAT05-043.figureLine: A single standing clay figure plants its feet and lifts its torso upright, posture quietly firm and self-protective, conveying the resolve to name a pattern and stand its ground.
CAT05-043.sceneLine: A repeating series of sharp blue-indigo accent angular forms presses toward the figure but meets one steady soft light blue-indigo upright barrier that holds the line, suggesting harmful patterns recognized and finally checked.

CAT05-044.headline: Psychological Safety
CAT05-044.subtitle: Why teams thrive or collapse
CAT05-044.figureLine: Three clay figures stand in a loose ring leaning slightly inward toward one another, postures open and unguarded, conveying the trust that lets a group hold together.
CAT05-044.sceneLine: A gentle blue-indigo accent dome of soft light arcs over the grouped figures while pale blue-indigo ground steadies beneath them, suggesting a shared space safe enough for everyone to speak.

CAT05-045.headline: Mentorship At Work
CAT05-045.subtitle: How mentorship shapes mental health at work
CAT05-045.figureLine: Two clay figures sit side by side at a slight tilt, the taller one inclined toward the other in calm attention, conveying steady guidance offered without pressure.
CAT05-045.sceneLine: A soft light blue-indigo strand passes gently from one figure's open hand toward the other, brightening to pale blue-indigo as it arrives, suggesting knowledge and reassurance handed forward.

CAT05-046.headline: Imposter Phenomenon
CAT05-046.subtitle: Why high achievers feel like frauds at work
CAT05-046.figureLine: A single standing clay figure draws one shoulder inward and glances down at itself, posture quietly doubtful despite standing tall, conveying competence shadowed by private unease.
CAT05-046.sceneLine: Behind the figure a large, solid blue-indigo accent form looms while its own pale blue-indigo reflection on the ground appears small and faint, suggesting real ability misjudged as too little.

CAT05-047.headline: Feedback Without Fear
CAT05-047.subtitle: Giving and receiving feedback without triggering anxiety
CAT05-047.figureLine: Two clay figures face one another at an easy, level distance, postures relaxed and attentive, conveying honest exchange offered and received without flinching.
CAT05-047.sceneLine: A small soft light blue-indigo rounded form passes calmly between the two figures along a smooth pale blue-indigo arc, suggesting candor handed over gently rather than thrown.

CAT05-048.headline: Workplace Friendships
CAT05-048.subtitle: Benefits, boundaries, and gray areas
CAT05-048.figureLine: Two clay figures stand close but with a measured gap between them, postures warm yet self-aware, conveying closeness held alongside healthy limits.
CAT05-048.sceneLine: Two overlapping blue-indigo accent rings share a soft light blue-indigo crescent of common space while keeping their own pale blue-indigo edges distinct, suggesting connection and boundary coexisting.

CAT05-049.headline: Exclusion At Work
CAT05-049.subtitle: How workplace exclusion and discrimination harm mental health
CAT05-049.figureLine: A single clay figure stands slightly apart and turned at the edge of an empty space, posture quiet and contained rather than collapsed, conveying the ache of being kept outside.
CAT05-049.sceneLine: A cluster of blue-indigo accent forms gathers tightly together while one pale blue-indigo form rests just beyond their soft light blue-indigo circle, suggesting a person left at the margin and the room held open for return.

CAT05-050.headline: Trust In Remote Teams
CAT05-050.subtitle: Building trust without physical presence
CAT05-050.figureLine: Two clay figures stand at a distance yet lean subtly toward each other, postures attentive across the gap, conveying connection sustained without nearness.
CAT05-050.sceneLine: A continuous soft light blue-indigo thread spans the open space between the two figures, glowing pale blue-indigo at each end, suggesting trust carried across distance by steady attention.

CAT05-052.headline: Layoffs And Mental Health
CAT05-052.subtitle: Processing job loss and moving forward
CAT05-052.figureLine: A single seated clay figure rests for a moment with hands loose in its lap, then lifts its gaze forward, posture steadying after a fall, conveying loss absorbed and a path resuming.
CAT05-052.sceneLine: A blue-indigo accent shape breaks away and drifts off while a fresh soft light blue-indigo form begins to take shape on the pale blue-indigo ground ahead, suggesting one ending releasing room for what comes next.

CAT05-053.headline: Psychology Of Job Searching
CAT05-053.subtitle: Managing rejection during the search
CAT05-053.figureLine: A single standing clay figure takes one composed step forward with shoulders level, posture patient after being turned away, conveying persistence held steady through repeated tries.
CAT05-053.sceneLine: A row of blue-indigo accent doorways recedes into the distance, several closed but one soft light blue-indigo opening glowing pale blue-indigo ahead, suggesting many no's and the one yes still waiting.

CAT05-054.headline: Starting A New Job
CAT05-054.subtitle: Managing anxiety and adjustment
CAT05-054.figureLine: A single clay figure stands at a threshold with one foot lifted to cross it, posture tentative but willing, conveying the nervous courage of a first day.
CAT05-054.sceneLine: A soft light blue-indigo archway opens onto unfamiliar pale blue-indigo ground that steadies into firmer blue-indigo accent footing just beyond, suggesting newness settling into place with time.

CAT05-055.headline: Mid-Career Crisis
CAT05-055.subtitle: Navigating a loss of professional meaning
CAT05-055.figureLine: A single clay figure pauses mid-stride and turns its torso to look back along the way it came, posture searching and reflective, conveying a person questioning the path they are on.
CAT05-055.sceneLine: A long blue-indigo accent line behind the figure dissolves into haze while a new soft light blue-indigo direction faintly opens to one side over pale blue-indigo ground, suggesting old meaning fading and another quietly forming.

CAT05-057.headline: Costs Of Freelancing
CAT05-057.subtitle: The hidden mental health costs of freelancing
CAT05-057.figureLine: A single clay figure stands balanced on a narrow base, holding several small forms aloft alone, posture capable but visibly carrying everything itself, conveying the solitary weight of working unsupported.
CAT05-057.sceneLine: Several blue-indigo accent shapes hover unevenly around the lone figure with no soft light blue-indigo frame to hold them, resting on slim pale blue-indigo footing, suggesting independence that quietly bears every load alone.

CAT05-058.headline: Back To School
CAT05-058.subtitle: Managing stress and identity
CAT05-058.figureLine: A single clay figure sits leaning forward over its hands in patient concentration, posture earnest and a little weary, conveying a grown learner beginning again.
CAT05-058.sceneLine: A soft light blue-indigo form layers in fresh pale blue-indigo lines over an existing blue-indigo accent base beside the figure, suggesting a new identity built atop the one already there.

CAT05-060.headline: Resilience In Transition
CAT05-060.subtitle: Building resilience during career transitions
CAT05-060.figureLine: A single standing clay figure shifts its weight onto a forward foot on uneven ground, posture braced yet adaptable, conveying steadiness found while everything shifts.
CAT05-060.sceneLine: A blue-indigo accent surface tilts and rearranges beneath the figure while a soft light blue-indigo band of pale blue-indigo keeps it upright, suggesting balance maintained through change.

CAT05-061.headline: Five Years Of Remote Data
CAT05-061.subtitle: What the long view reveals about remote work
CAT05-061.figureLine: A single clay figure sits with hands resting evenly on a small surface before it, posture settled and considering, conveying a calm look back over a long stretch of change.
CAT05-061.sceneLine: A series of soft light blue-indigo rings widens outward across pale blue-indigo ground beside the figure, each a steady blue-indigo accent layer, suggesting years of accumulated experience read as a clear pattern.

CAT05-062.headline: Zoom Fatigue
CAT05-062.subtitle: Why video calls drain more than in-person meetings
CAT05-062.figureLine: A single seated clay figure slumps gently toward a glowing rectangle at its eye level, posture heavy and depleted, conveying the quiet exhaustion of staring at a screen too long.
CAT05-062.sceneLine: A flat blue-indigo accent panel emits a tiring soft light blue-indigo glare onto the figure while warmer pale blue-indigo light fades at the edges, suggesting energy steadily drawn out through the screen.

CAT05-063.headline: Remote Work Loneliness
CAT05-063.subtitle: Why digital connection feels hollow
CAT05-063.figureLine: A single clay figure sits curled slightly toward itself in an open space, posture quiet and inward, conveying solitude felt even while connected.
CAT05-063.sceneLine: Faint blue-indigo accent threads reach toward the figure but thin to almost nothing before arriving, leaving a wide pale blue-indigo emptiness and one soft light blue-indigo glimmer nearby, suggesting links that touch but do not quite reach.

CAT05-064.headline: Healthy Work-From-Home Routine
CAT05-064.subtitle: Building a routine for mental health
CAT05-064.figureLine: A single standing clay figure stands centered and at ease within a clearly bounded patch of ground, posture balanced and unhurried, conveying a day given gentle structure.
CAT05-064.sceneLine: A soft light blue-indigo frame divides the space around the figure into calm pale blue-indigo zones marked by blue-indigo accent thresholds, suggesting work and rest held in clear, restful proportion.

CAT05-065.headline: Hybrid Work Challenges
CAT05-065.subtitle: Managing two work environments
CAT05-065.figureLine: A single clay figure stands with one foot in each of two adjoining spaces, torso turning to balance both, posture poised between, conveying the effort of living across two settings.
CAT05-065.sceneLine: Two distinct blue-indigo accent zones meet along a soft light blue-indigo seam beneath the figure, joined by a pale blue-indigo bridge, suggesting two worlds the figure must hold together.

CAT05-066.headline: Digital Presenteeism
CAT05-066.subtitle: The pressure to always appear online
CAT05-066.figureLine: A single clay figure holds itself upright and alert long past its own tiredness, posture stiff with the strain of staying visible, conveying the cost of always seeming present.
CAT05-066.sceneLine: A persistent blue-indigo accent glow stays fixed on the figure no matter how it leans, with no soft light blue-indigo shadow allowed to fall on the pale blue-indigo ground, suggesting a light that never lets one step away.

CAT05-067.headline: Notification Overload
CAT05-067.subtitle: How chat notifications harm focus and mental health
CAT05-067.figureLine: A single seated clay figure bends over a small task while flinching slightly at repeated interruptions, posture braced against constant pulls, conveying focus fractured by endless pings.
CAT05-067.sceneLine: Small blue-indigo accent bursts pop up scattered around the figure's hands, breaking a single soft light blue-indigo thread of attention into pale blue-indigo fragments, suggesting concentration repeatedly shattered.

CAT05-069.headline: Overcoming Proximity Bias
CAT05-069.subtitle: Building a remote career on equal footing
CAT05-069.figureLine: A single distant clay figure straightens and steps forward into clearer view, posture determined to be seen, conveying the push to count from far away.
CAT05-069.sceneLine: A faint pale blue-indigo figure-form at the far edge brightens into a full blue-indigo accent presence as a soft light blue-indigo path draws it level with the center, suggesting distance no longer dimming worth.

CAT05-070.headline: Work In A Changing Economy
CAT05-070.subtitle: How AI, remote work, and gig labor affect mental health
CAT05-070.figureLine: A single clay figure stands steady on shifting ground while new forms rearrange around it, posture grounded amid flux, conveying composure held through rapid change.
CAT05-070.sceneLine: Several blue-indigo accent shapes dissolve and re-form into new soft light blue-indigo configurations around the figure, the pale blue-indigo ground beneath staying level, suggesting a working world remade while the person stays whole.

CAT05-071.headline: Emotional Intelligence In Leadership
CAT05-071.subtitle: Why it outperforms IQ
CAT05-071.figureLine: A single clay figure stands with one hand open and slightly extended toward unseen others, posture attentive and grounded, conveying a leader who senses and steadies the room.
CAT05-071.sceneLine: Soft light blue-indigo ripples spread outward from the figure's open hand across pale blue-indigo ground, smoothing scattered blue-indigo accent forms into calm alignment, suggesting influence that comes from understanding.

CAT05-072.headline: Supporting Employee Mental Health
CAT05-072.subtitle: A manager's guide to supporting staff
CAT05-072.figureLine: Two clay figures stand together, the slightly larger one inclining attentively toward the other in a steadying gesture, posture supportive and calm, conveying care offered from a position of responsibility.
CAT05-072.sceneLine: A broad soft light blue-indigo arc curves protectively behind the smaller figure while a blue-indigo accent base holds firm beneath both on pale blue-indigo ground, suggesting steady support extended downward.

CAT05-073.headline: Burnout-Proof Leadership
CAT05-073.subtitle: How managers can protect their teams
CAT05-073.figureLine: A single clay figure stands with arms gently raised to shelter a small grouping behind it, posture firm and protective, conveying a leader absorbing pressure on a team's behalf.
CAT05-073.sceneLine: A soft light blue-indigo canopy spreads above several small pale blue-indigo forms, deflecting a heavy blue-indigo accent weight to the side, suggesting strain shielded before it reaches the team.

CAT05-074.headline: Building Psychological Safety
CAT05-074.subtitle: Creating safety in the workplace
CAT05-074.figureLine: A single clay figure kneels and lays a steady hand on solid ground, posture purposeful and grounding, conveying the deliberate work of making a space safe to speak.
CAT05-074.sceneLine: Under the figure's hand the pale blue-indigo ground firms into a level soft light blue-indigo platform ringed by a calm blue-indigo accent border, suggesting a foundation built for trust.

CAT05-075.headline: Culture Over Wellness Programs
CAT05-075.subtitle: Why organizational culture matters most
CAT05-075.figureLine: A single clay figure stands rooted on deep, solid ground while a small token form rests untouched beside it, posture settled by what is beneath rather than what is added on, conveying substance over surface.
CAT05-075.sceneLine: A deep blue-indigo accent foundation runs far down beneath the figure while a thin soft light blue-indigo layer floats decoratively above on pale blue-indigo ground, suggesting real culture rooted below what is merely offered on top.

CAT08-007.headline: Environment Design
CAT08-007.subtitle: How environment design shapes habits and behavior
CAT08-007.figureLine: A single clay figure reaches naturally toward an easily placed form while a more distant one sits out of casual reach, posture effortlessly guided by its surroundings, conveying behavior shaped by how a space is arranged.
CAT08-007.sceneLine: Blue-indigo accent forms are arranged so the helpful one sits in a bright soft light blue-indigo zone close at hand and the unhelpful one fades into far pale blue-indigo distance, suggesting surroundings quietly steering choice.

CAT08-011.headline: Intrinsic Vs Extrinsic Motivation
CAT08-011.subtitle: Why the source matters
CAT08-011.figureLine: A single clay figure leans forward into its own forward motion, drawn by something within rather than pulled from outside, posture self-propelled and willing, conveying drive that comes from inside.
CAT08-011.sceneLine: A warm soft light blue-indigo glow rises from within the figure's core and carries it forward, outshining a faint external blue-indigo accent lure on the pale blue-indigo ground ahead, suggesting inner motivation outlasting outer reward.

CAT08-025.headline: The Minimum Effective Dose
CAT08-025.subtitle: Building a sustainable daily routine
CAT08-025.figureLine: A single clay figure performs one small, unhurried action with ease, posture light and conserving its energy, conveying just enough effort kept up over time.
CAT08-025.sceneLine: A single modest soft light blue-indigo form glows steadily on pale blue-indigo ground beside the figure, far smaller than the strained blue-indigo accent mass beyond it, suggesting a small dose that lasts because it never overwhelms.

CAT08-047.headline: Temptation Bundling
CAT08-047.subtitle: Pairing pleasures with necessary tasks
CAT08-047.figureLine: A single clay figure works at a small task with relaxed ease, one hand resting on a pleasing companion form, posture content rather than burdened, conveying duty made enjoyable.
CAT08-047.sceneLine: A plain blue-indigo accent form is gently tied to a brighter soft light blue-indigo one by a single pale blue-indigo loop beside the figure, suggesting a chore paired with a pleasure so both move together.

CAT08-062.headline: Systems Over Goals
CAT08-062.subtitle: Why daily process drives lasting change
CAT08-062.figureLine: A single clay figure tends a small repeating motion with calm, even hands, posture absorbed in the doing rather than reaching past it, conveying attention to process over a distant prize.
CAT08-062.sceneLine: A smooth soft light blue-indigo loop of motion turns steadily beside the figure on pale blue-indigo ground while a faraway blue-indigo accent marker sits ignored, suggesting the daily cycle mattering more than the endpoint.

CAT08-065.headline: Small Daily Improvements
CAT08-065.subtitle: How small gains compound into lasting change
CAT08-065.figureLine: A single clay figure adds one tiny form to a slowly rising stack with patient care, posture steady and repeating, conveying minute gains accumulating over time.
CAT08-065.sceneLine: A gentle stair of soft light blue-indigo forms climbs from a low pale blue-indigo start to a higher blue-indigo accent height beside the figure, each step barely taller than the last, suggesting small improvements compounding upward.

CAT10-018.headline: Configure A Phone For Wellbeing
CAT10-018.subtitle: How to set up a smartphone to support mental health
CAT10-018.figureLine: A single clay figure sets down a small rectangular form with calm, deliberate hands, posture composed and in control, conveying a person taming a device rather than serving it.
CAT10-018.sceneLine: A small blue-indigo accent rectangle dims its harsh glow to a soft light blue-indigo calm under the figure's touch, its scattered pale blue-indigo distractions settling quiet, suggesting a device tuned to serve peace.

CAT10-019.headline: The Productivity Paradox
CAT10-019.subtitle: Why more technology means less done
CAT10-019.figureLine: A single clay figure stands surrounded by many small tools yet pauses mid-reach, overwhelmed by abundance, posture stalled amid plenty, conveying effort scattered by too many options.
CAT10-019.sceneLine: A crowd of small blue-indigo accent forms multiplies around the figure until a single clear soft light blue-indigo path through them nearly vanishes into pale blue-indigo clutter, suggesting more tools yielding less progress.

CAT10-043.headline: The Right To Disconnect
CAT10-043.subtitle: Stepping away from work outside office hours
CAT10-043.figureLine: A single clay figure turns its back on a fading glow and steps into restful open space, posture relieved and unburdened, conveying the freedom to set work down.
CAT10-043.sceneLine: A blue-indigo accent glow dims behind the figure as a calm soft light blue-indigo expanse of pale blue-indigo evening opens ahead, suggesting work released at the day's clear edge.

CAT12-014.headline: Stigma In The Workplace
CAT12-014.subtitle: Mental health stigma and its hidden costs
CAT12-014.figureLine: A single clay figure stands half-shielding something it holds close to its chest, posture guarded and quietly carrying a hidden weight, conveying a struggle kept unspoken at work.
CAT12-014.sceneLine: A heavy blue-indigo accent shroud partly conceals a soft light blue-indigo form the figure holds, its true pale blue-indigo shape only faintly showing, suggesting a burden hidden because it cannot safely be seen.

CAT15-043.headline: Remote Work Isolation
CAT15-043.subtitle: Social isolation and staying connected
CAT15-043.figureLine: A single clay figure sits alone in a wide open space yet turns toward a faint distant warmth, posture solitary but reaching, conveying isolation met with the will to stay connected.
CAT15-043.sceneLine: A lone figure rests within a broad pale blue-indigo emptiness while a single soft light blue-indigo thread stretches toward a small blue-indigo accent glow far off, suggesting connection still sought across the distance.

CAT19-031.headline: High-Pressure Professions
CAT19-031.subtitle: Mental health toll on men in finance, law and medicine
CAT19-031.figureLine: A single clay figure stands tall under a great pressing weight, jaw set and shoulders holding firm at quiet cost, posture stoic beneath strain, conveying composure maintained under relentless demand.
CAT19-031.sceneLine: A dense blue-indigo accent mass bears down on the upright figure while a thin soft light blue-indigo line of pale blue-indigo relief begins to ease in at one side, suggesting heavy expectation and the first room to set it down.

CAT19-057.headline: Programs For Male-Dominated Industries
CAT19-057.subtitle: Mental health support built for these workplaces
CAT19-057.figureLine: A single clay figure lowers a heavy form it has long carried onto a waiting steady base, posture loosening with relief, conveying a guarded person finally allowed to set the weight down.
CAT19-057.sceneLine: A sturdy soft light blue-indigo support rises from the pale blue-indigo ground to take a blue-indigo accent load from the figure's arms, suggesting help shaped to fit a place where asking has been hard.
